center.name: 约克角半岛
center.summary: 约克角半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、巴布亞蟆口鴟、澳大利亚金丝燕等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Arafura fantail (Rhipidura dryas), sometimes known as the wood fantail, inhabits the Lesser Sunda Islands, the northern coast of Australia from the Kimberley to the western side of the Cape York Peninsula, including subcoastally in the Top End of the Northern Territory, and southern New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ashy-bellied white-eye (Zosterops citrinella) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae found in the Lesser Sunda Islands in the Indonesian Archipelago and northern Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-throated finch (Poephila cincta), or parson finch, is a species of estrildid finch found in grassy woodlands throughout north-east Australia from Cape York Peninsula to central Queensland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ocularis is found in New Guinea, the Torres Strait Islands, and Cape York intergrading with the nominate race along the Gulf of Carpentaria river system

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: During the breeding season from November to March, the buff-breasted paradise kingfisher is found in coastal north-east Queensland from islands in the Torres Strait and Cape York Peninsula south to Byfield, in central Queensland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The forest kingfisher is native to Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, the Solomon Islands, and Australia, where it is found on or near the Australian coastline from Port Stephens in New South Wales northwards to Cape York and westwards across the Top End

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Aru Islands, southern New Guinea, and Cape York Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is monotypic within the genus Glycichaera. It is found in the Aru Islands, New Guinea and northern Cape York Peninsula. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northeastern Cape York Peninsula, Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: westralensis extends through the northern arid and southwestern arid regions of Australia, respectively, with overlap in the central arid regions. The hooded robin is not found in Tasmania, on the Nullarbor Plain, Cape York or inland around the Simpson Desert

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia. It was found to be genetically distinct from the Papuan scrub robin, which were thought to be members of the same species. A putative subspecies D

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The flycatcher is found in northern Australia, from the Kimberley region of Western Australia, across the Top End of the Northern Territory, to the Gulf Country and south-western Cape York Peninsula of north-west Queensland, with a population on Saibai Island in Torres Strait

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Aru Islands, New Guinea and the northern Cape York Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-cheeked parrot is found in Cape York Peninsula, Australia, Indonesia, East Timor, and Papua New Guinea and several other islands in the region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red goshawk (Erythrotriorchis radiatus) is a bird of prey found in Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Aru Islands, New Guinea and northern Australia, where it is found in Arnhem Land, the northern Kimberleys, the eastern Cape York Peninsula, and the Mackay Region of eastern Queensland. It is the only exclusively tropical owl in Australia. The global population size of Ninox rufa has yet to be determined, but the species is considered uncommon to rare. The owl inhabits terrestrial ecosystems

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in coastal areas of New Guinea and eastern Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical mangrove forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and eastern Cape York Peninsula of Queensland, Australia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cinerascens is found in south-eastern New Guinea and the Cape York Peninsula of Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-breasted boatbill can be found in the southern hemisphere, living in tropical areas all across New Guinea, but is not endemic to any specific country or island. This species has a very large range and it can also be found at the Cape York Peninsula, Australia, having been documented inhabiting the subtropical and tropical rainforests of North Queensland.{{Cite journal|last=Freeman|first=B

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and Cape York Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-throated miner has the widest distribution of the Manorina species, and it is found across most of Australia, except east of the Great Dividing Range, on Cape York Peninsula, the very north-eastern Northern Territory, and small patches of the driest parts in Central Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plumed whistling duck has a range across the eastern, northern and central parts of Australia from the Kimberley across the Top End and Cape York, down to southern Queensland and northern New South Wales on the east coast, although may reach north-western Victoria inland, in the vicinity of the Murray River. It is also found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Papuan frogmouth (Podargus papuensis) is a species of bird in the family Podargidae, found in the Aru Islands, New Guinea, and in Cape York Peninsula, Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Varied trillers prefer warm, reasonably moist environments and are found in New Guinea and the Bismarck Archipelago, along much of the tropical and sub-tropical coastal hinterland of eastern Australia, from about the Sydney area to the tip of Cape York Peninsula, in the moister part of the Kimberley, and throughout the Top End

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: stenolophus |(van Ort 1911) }} | range_map = Bird range palm cockatoo.png | range_map_caption = Australian palm cockatoo range (in green) }} The palm cockatoo (Probosciger aterrimus), also known as the goliath cockatoo or great black cockatoo, is a large, smoky-grey/black parrot of the cockatoo family native to New Guinea, the Aru Islands and the Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia. It has a crest of long feathers atop its head, with a very large and strong, sharply-hooked black beak (with which it can easily open nuts and seeds), and prominent bright-red cheek patches.{{cite book |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=v2GYDwAAQBAJ&pg=PA122 |page=122 |title=Birds of New Guinea: Second Edition |author1=Thane K

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fawn-breasted bowerbird is distributed throughout New Guinea and northern Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, where it inhabits tropical forests, mangroves, savanna woodlands and forest edges

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: terraereginae occurs in tropical north-east Queensland from the Claudie River on the Cape York Peninsula south as far as the Eungella Range near Mackay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australian magpie is found in the Trans-Fly region of southern New Guinea, between the Oriomo River and Muli Strait, and across most of Australia, bar the tip of Cape York, the Gibson and Great Sandy Deserts, and the southwest of Tasmania. The Australian magpie prefers open areas such as grassland, fields and residential areas such as parks, gardens, golf courses, and streets, with scattered trees or forest nearby

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is common to abundant throughout the relatively fertile south-west and south-east parts of Australia (including Tasmania and the Bass Strait islands), and through the well-watered coastal zone of tropical Queensland, including Cape York Peninsula The silvereye is liable to be found in any vegetated area, apart from open grasslands, within its distribution range, including forest, scrub, horticultural blocks and urban gardens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern New Guinea and Cape York Peninsula in Queensland, Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern Australia and has a range that extends from the Cape York Peninsula in the north to Cape Otway in the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|left|Red-capped Robin in New South Wales The red-capped robin is found across Australia, except for Tasmania, Cape York, the Top End, and most of the Kimberley (there have been occasional sightings in the southernmost parts)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Cape York Peninsula and northeast Queensland of northeast Australia
